B.name: Rava Upma
B.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗楼脙聜脗拢
steps: Dry roast semolina in a pan on medium heat until lightly golden and fragrant 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 about 4 min. Set aside.
Heat oil in same pan. Add mustard seeds, curry leaves and cashews. Let mustard pop.
Add finely chopped onion, green chilli and ginger. Cook until onion is soft 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 about 3 min.
Add 2 cups boiling water and salt. Bring to boil.
Pour in roasted semolina gradually, stirring constantly to avoid lumps. Cook on low heat 3 min. Finish with lemon juice and coriander.
B.tip: Use boiling water 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 cold water makes lumpy upma. The roasting step is what gives it the nutty aroma.

L.name: Dal Tadka
L.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗楼脙聜脗拢
steps: Pressure cook toor dal with turmeric and salt until mushy. Mash and adjust.
Heat ghee 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 add cumin, asafoetida, red chillies 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 sizzle 30 sec.
Add garlic golden, then onion golden, then tomato soft.
Pour tadka over dal, stir, simmer 5 min.
Garnish with coriander. Serve with rice or roti.
L.tip: Use real ghee for the tadka 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 the flavour difference is dramatic.

D.name: Cheese & Veggie Quesadillas
D.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗芦脙聜脗聰
steps: Saut脙聝脗聝脙聜脗漏 diced capsicum and onion in oil until soft. Add black beans and corn.
Season with cumin, smoked paprika, salt and pepper. Cook 2 min more.
Lay tortilla flat. Add cheese on one half, then vegetable mix, then more cheese.
Fold in half. Press in a dry pan on medium ~2 min each side until golden.
Serve with sliced avocado and sour cream.
D.tip: Do not overfill 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 a thin layer toasts more evenly and stays crisp.

B.name: Pesarattu
B.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗芦脙聜脗聰
steps: Soak whole moong dal overnight. Drain well.
Blend soaked moong with ginger, green chilli, cumin and a little rice to a smooth, pourable batter. Season with salt.
Heat a flat tawa until very hot. Pour one ladle of batter and spread into a thin circle 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 thinner than dosa.
Drizzle oil around edges. Scatter finely chopped onion and coriander on top, press lightly.
Cook on medium heat until edges lift and bottom is golden 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 about 3 min. Fold and serve with ginger chutney.
B.tip: The batter should be thinner than idli batter but thicker than water. Spread quickly 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 moong batter sets fast.

L.name: Rajma Chawal
L.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗芦脙聜脗聵
steps: Pressure cook soaked kidney beans until very soft 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 they should mash easily. Reserve liquid.
Saut脙聝脗聝脙聜脗漏 onion in oil until deep golden 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 this takes 7脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聯8 min, don't rush it. Add ginger, garlic, cook 2 min.
Add blended tomatoes and red chilli. Cook until oil separates from masala 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 about 5 min.
Add beans with cooking liquid. Simmer 15 min. Mash 脙聝脗聜脙聜脗录 of beans against the pot for a creamy gravy.
Serve with basmati rice, sliced onion, lemon and green chilli on the side.
L.tip: The depth of golden-brown onion is what separates good rajma from great rajma. Take your time.

D.name: Dal Fry with Jeera Rice
D.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗楼脙聜脗拢
steps: Pressure cook both dals with turmeric and salt until completely soft. Whisk smooth.
Heat ghee in a separate pan. Add cumin seeds, dried red chillies, asafoetida 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 sizzle 20 seconds.
Add very finely chopped onion, cook 5 min until golden. Add ginger, garlic, cook 2 min.
Add diced tomato, cook until oil separates. Pour this tarka into the dal.
For jeera rice: heat ghee, add cumin, add soaked basmati, cook 12 min on low with 1.5x water covered.
D.tip: Dal fry should be thicker and richer than dal tadka 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 use less water and let it reduce more.

B.name: Protein Smoothie Bowl
B.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗芦脙聜脗聬
steps: Blend Greek yogurt, frozen berries and banana until thick and smooth 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 thicker than a regular smoothie.
Pour into a bowl. It should hold toppings without sinking.
Arrange granola, fresh berries, sliced banana and mixed nuts on top.
Drizzle with honey and sprinkle chia seeds.
Eat immediately before toppings soften.
B.tip: Keep the base very thick 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 add liquid a tablespoon at a time. Freeze the bowl for 5 min for an extra cold base.

L.name: Spiced Chickpea Wrap
L.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗聦脙聜脗炉
steps: Drain and rinse chickpeas. Toss with cumin, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt and olive oil.
Pan-fry chickpeas on high heat 5 min, stirring occasionally, until slightly crispy.
Mix tahini with lemon juice and a splash of water to make a drizzleable sauce.
Warm tortilla. Layer spinach, diced cucumber, tomato, spiced chickpeas.
Drizzle tahini sauce and a spoon of yogurt. Roll tightly.
L.tip: The crispy chickpeas are the hero 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 don't skip the pan-fry step.

D.name: Tofu & Veg Stir Fry
D.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗楼脙聜脗垄
steps: Press tofu 10 min, cube. Pan-fry in hot oil until golden on most sides ~6 min.
Cook rice per packet. Prep all vegetables into bite-sized pieces.
In same hot pan, stir fry broccoli and carrot 3 min, then capsicum 2 min more.
Add ginger and garlic, toss 30 sec. Return tofu to pan.
Add soy sauce and sesame oil. Toss well. Serve over rice topped with sesame seeds.
D.tip: High heat, fast cooking 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 do not crowd the pan or vegetables steam instead.

B.name: Dahi Chivda
B.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗楼脙聜脗聸
steps: Rinse flattened rice quickly under water. Drain immediately 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 it softens fast.
In a bowl, whisk thick curd with a pinch of sugar and salt until smooth.
Add drained poha to the curd. Mix gently.
Add finely grated ginger and chopped green chilli. Stir to combine.
Top with pomegranate seeds, coriander and a sprinkle of cumin. Eat immediately.
B.tip: Use very thick curd 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 if it is too runny, strain it through a cloth for 10 minutes first.

L.name: Soya Chunks Masala
L.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗芦脙聜脗聶
steps: Boil soya chunks 5 min in salted water, squeeze completely dry.
Fry onion golden, add ginger and garlic, cook 2 min.
Add tomatoes, red chilli and cumin. Cook until mashy.
Stir in beaten curd slowly. Add soya + 1 cup water, simmer 10 min.
Finish with garam masala and coriander.
L.tip: Squeezing soya dry removes raw smell and helps masala penetrate.

D.name: Pasta Arrabiata
D.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗聧脙聜脗聺
steps: Boil pasta in salted water until al dente. Reserve pasta water.
Heat olive oil, add sliced garlic and chilli flakes until garlic is golden.
Add diced zucchini and capsicum, saut脙聝脗聝脙聜脗漏 3 min.
Add crushed tomatoes, season well, simmer 10 min until sauce thickens.
Toss with drained pasta and pasta water. Serve with basil and parmesan.
D.tip: Chilli flakes bloom in olive oil 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 this is where the heat depth comes from.

B.name: Muesli with Fresh Fruit
B.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗楼脙聜脗拢
steps: Pour muesli into a bowl.
Add milk or Greek yogurt to your preferred consistency.
Top with fresh berries, sliced banana and a drizzle of honey.
Sprinkle chia seeds for extra fibre.
B.tip: Soak muesli in milk overnight 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 bircher style is creamier and more digestible.

L.name: Buddha Bowl
L.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗楼脙聜脗聶
steps: Cook quinoa: rinse, simmer in 2脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聴 water 15 min, fluff and cool.
Roast chickpeas with olive oil and smoked paprika 200脙聝脗聜脙聜脗掳C for 20 min until crispy.
Make tahini dressing: whisk tahini, lemon juice, garlic, water until smooth.
Assemble: quinoa base, pile greens, cucumber, carrot ribbons, avocado and chickpeas.
Drizzle dressing. Finish with sesame seeds.
L.tip: Batch cook quinoa and roast chickpeas on Sunday 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 assembly takes 5 min on weekdays.

D.name: Shakshuka
D.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗聧脙聜脗鲁
steps: Heat olive oil in a wide oven-safe pan. Saut脙聝脗聝脙聜脗漏 onion and capsicum 5 min until soft.
Add garlic, cumin, smoked paprika and chilli flakes. Cook 1 min until fragrant.
Pour in crushed tomatoes. Season generously. Simmer 8 min until sauce thickens.
Make wells in the sauce with a spoon. Crack an egg into each well.
Cover and cook on low heat 5脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聯8 min until whites are set but yolks still runny. Crumble feta on top. Serve with crusty bread.
D.tip: Don't rush the yolks 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 pull off heat when whites are just set. They finish cooking in residual heat.

B.name: Moong Dal Cheela
B.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗楼脙聜脗聻
steps: Soak moong dal 2 hrs, blend with ginger and green chilli to smooth batter.
Add chopped onion, cumin, coriander and salt.
Heat non-stick tawa, drizzle oil. Pour batter, spread thin.
Cook 2脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聯3 min until edges lift, flip, cook 1脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聯2 min until golden.
Serve with green chutney or curd.

L.name: Gongura Pappu
L.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗芦脙聜脗聲
steps: Pressure cook toor dal with turmeric until very soft 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 3 whistles.
Wash gongura leaves well. In a pot, cook gongura with onion, green chilli, garlic and a little water until completely soft 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 about 10 min.
Blend gongura mixture to a coarse paste. Combine with cooked dal. Adjust consistency with water.
Simmer together 5 min. Season generously 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 gongura is naturally sour so less tamarind needed.
Temper: heat oil, add mustard seeds, dried red chilli, curry leaves 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 pour over dal. Serve with rice.
L.tip: Gongura (sorrel/roselle leaves) is available at Indian grocery stores. The sourness is the soul of this dish 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 do not reduce it.

D.name: Methi Dal
D.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗聧脙聜脗碌
steps: Cook masoor dal with turmeric until soft 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 no soaking needed ~12 min.
Heat ghee, add cumin, then garlic until golden.
Add onion 4 min, then tomato and green chilli until soft.
Add chopped methi, cook 3 min until wilted.
Combine with dal, simmer 5 min. Serve with chapati.
D.tip: If methi is too bitter, sprinkle with salt, rest 10 min, squeeze out water.

B.name: Aloo Paratha with Curd
B.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗芦脙聜脗聯
steps: Boil potatoes until very soft. Mash completely 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 no lumps allowed or they tear the dough.
Add finely chopped green chilli, ginger, cumin, coriander, amchur and salt to the mash. Mix well.
Knead soft wheat dough with water, salt and a little oil. Rest 10 min.
Roll dough disc, place 2 tbsp potato filling in centre, seal edges firmly. Roll gently into thick paratha.
Cook on hot tawa with generous ghee both sides until deep golden spots appear. Serve with cold curd and pickle.
B.tip: The potato filling must be completely dry and smooth. Any moisture makes it burst through the dough.

L.name: Rasam with Steamed Rice
L.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗聧脙聜脗虏
steps: Cook toor dal until soft. Soak tamarind in 脙聝脗聜脙聜脗陆 cup warm water, extract pulp.
Boil tamarind water with chopped tomato, turmeric, salt and rasam powder for 5 min.
Add cooked dal and thin with water to a soupy consistency. Simmer 5 min.
Heat ghee 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 add mustard seeds, dried red chilli, curry leaves, garlic 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 sizzle until garlic is golden.
Pour tadka over rasam. Serve hot over steamed rice with papadums.
L.tip: Rasam should be thin and peppery 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 not thick like sambar. Add enough water to make it genuinely soupy.

D.name: Tarka Dhal with Jeera Rice
D.emoji: 脙聝脗掳脙聜脗聼脙聜脗聧脙聜脗聸
steps: Wash moong dal and rice separately. Cook dal with turmeric and salt in 2.5x water until very soft and thick 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 about 15 min.
Cook basmati rice in separate pot: bring 1.5x water to boil, add rice, cover and simmer 12 min on lowest heat.
For the tarka: heat ghee until very hot. Add cumin seeds, asafoetida and dried red chilli 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 sizzle 20 seconds.
Add sliced garlic, fry until golden. Pour this entire tarka over the cooked dal.
Squeeze lemon juice, stir gently, garnish with coriander. Serve alongside jeera rice.
D.tip: The tarka must be poured immediately over the dal while sizzling hot 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聰 the sound and aroma are part of the experience.
